introSection: Meteor is a wooden roller coaster located at Little Amerricka in Marshall, Wisconsin, USA. It was built by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was purchased at an auction for $9,000 after Hillcrest Park closed.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 4 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders.

fullText:
Meteor is a wooden roller coaster located at Little Amerricka in Marshall, Wisconsin, USA. It was built by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters.

The ride was purchased at an auction for $9,000 after Hillcrest Park closed.



Single train with 4 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders.
